menu.title: 🐍 Bitsnake
menu.subtitle: A retro-style Snake game
menu.instruction1: • Use the directional buttons to move the snake
menu.instruction2: • Eat the red food to grow
menu.instruction3: • Avoid hitting your tail or the walls

instructions.title: Instructions
instructions.rewardsIntro: Several rewards can appear on the board at once. Each is worth 1, 2, or 3 points.
instructions.rewards2: • 2 points: worth more; after 4 s it starts blinking and disappears in 8 s if you don't get it in time.
instructions.rewards3: • 3 points: worth even more; also blinks and disappears in 8 s. Higher-value rewards can vanish before you reach them!
instructions.walls: • Walls: normal (hit = game over) or ghost (pass through and reappear on the other side).
instructions.obstacles: • Obstacles: fixed blocks on the board that you must avoid.
instructions.controls: • Controls: directional buttons or trackpad (slide your finger).

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.emptyEncourage: Play your first game and get on the board!
